summary: This cluster focuses on the taxonomic revision and phylogenetic characterization of Antarctic lichen phycobionts, specifically the green algal genus *Astrochloris*. Researchers identified six distinct species, including three new species, from samples collected on King George Island and Morro Chico, using a combination of microscopy, morphological data, and phylogenetic analyses of nuclear and plastid genes. The findings established three distinct clades within *Astrochloris*, each defined by unique molecular signatures, highlighting the cryptic diversity of these photobionts in the Antarctic region.
entity_sample: nuclear small subunit and large subunit (LSU) rDNA sequence data
